title: High Pass closure and alpha-playthrough hardening
summary: Packet 129 should make the current playable arc feel complete from the first beach outing through High Pass filing, without opening season three, biome six, a broader planner shell, or another High Pass geometry-density pass.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-1 post-High-Pass station and chapter-state closure pass.
execution_order.why_now: The game now has a strong route to High Pass; the next risk is that station and map surfaces still read as if High Pass is merely next after the player files it.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-2 High Pass filed synthesis pass.
execution_order.why_now: Filing High Pass should teach a relationship and close the arc, not just mark another checklist done.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-3 High Pass endcap and return-readability pass.
execution_order.why_now: High Pass already has enough pockets; the final route moment needs to feel like an arrived-at place with a legible return.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the lane-4 end-to-end High Pass filing loop proof.
execution_order.why_now: The current alpha arc needs deterministic coverage from season closure into High Pass completion so future expansion does not break the finished loop.

execution_order.goal: Remove the filed High Pass expedition card's leftover start-facing display chrome.
execution_order.why_now: The lane-1 closure review found the filed expedition card and activation notice still inherit generic `STARTS` / `Start:` language.

execution_order.goal: Review the filed expedition-card chrome fix before the final route-loop proof unblocks.
execution_order.why_now: The end-to-end proof should assert a settled filed card, not a filed card that still visually reads like a launch prompt.

execution_order.goal: Make the note-ready High Pass expedition activation honor the station filing notice instead of reopening the world map.
execution_order.why_now: The filed chrome review confirmed the filed state is fixed, but found the same activation seam can still make the ready-to-file card feel start-facing.

execution_order.goal: Review the note-ready expedition activation follow-up before the final route-loop proof unblocks.
execution_order.why_now: The end-to-end proof should start from a settled High Pass ready-to-file station state.

guardrails: Make the current arc land cleanly from first outing through High Pass filing before starting season three or biome six.
Once `treeline-high-pass` is filed, station, atlas, archive, expedition, journal, notice, and map surfaces should not keep implying High Pass is still unstarted.
Prefer filed-state synthesis, return readability, and deterministic proof over new geography or more High Pass density.
Keep the closure handheld-safe at `256x160`; do not add a larger notebook dump, quest log, planner panel, or station dashboard.
Continue reducing responsibility in `field-season-board.ts`, `overlay-render.ts`, and `game.ts` where this pass touches shared state.

main_320_focus.chapter_state_target: Extend `resolveHighPassChapterState` around one explicit phase model: `dormant` while `seasonCloseReturnPending` is true after `forest-season-threads`, `active` while `treeline-high-pass` is open/gathering, `ready-to-file` when `save.routeV2Progress` for `treeline-high-pass` is `ready-to-synthesize`, and `filed` once `treeline-high-pass` is in `completedFieldRequestIds`. Keep pre-`forest-season-threads` as `null`, and let filed win if save data is mixed.
main_320_focus.surface_target: Update station routes, atlas, archive strip, expedition card, world-map cue, season subtitle, and adjacent route-locator copy so they stop saying or implying `High Pass next` once the route is filed. Reuse the existing routes shell, archive strip, atlas line, and `HIGH PASS` expedition card; do not add a new shell.
main_320_focus.protective_split_target: Pull more chapter/outing state composition out of `field-season-board.ts` into `high-pass-chapter-state.ts` or a tiny adjacent helper, rather than adding more inline `High Pass` conditionals.
filed_surface_direction: Station routes may keep one compact `HIGH PASS` card, but it should read `FILED` and avoid a travel action.
Atlas and archive copy should move to past-tense filed language such as `High Pass filed from Treeline Pass.` and `Root Hollow led into High Pass.`
After filed, `resolveSeasonOutingLocator` / field-request state should stop surfacing `route-locator:treeline`, route marker, and `Today: High Pass`.
verification_targets: season close pending still suppresses High Pass as a live request
High Pass active/opened state still routes the player to Treeline Pass
High Pass ready-to-file state points back to station filing
High Pass filed state reads as filed and does not send the player back as if unstarted
opening the station after High Pass filed shows a calm complete-arc state
world map and journal no longer synthesize `Today: High Pass` / `route-locator:treeline` after filing
non_goals: Do not add a new station tab, planner row, or dashboard.
Do not open season three or another route.
Do not reopen nursery or beach/treeline density work.

main_321_focus.synthesis_target: Refresh the existing `treeline-high-pass.routeV2Note` filed path so filing the route ties together stone lift, lee watch, rime mark, talus hold, low ridge life, exposed ground, and shelter pockets without adding a new shell.

copy_target.filedText: Stone lift, lee watch, rime mark, and talus hold show how low ridge life uses shelter pockets on exposed High Pass.
copy_target.clueBackedTail: show how low ridge life uses shelter pockets on exposed High Pass.

verification_targets: High Pass filing teaches a relationship instead of only checklist completion
ready-to-file route text and clue-backed filed text use the same relationship tail
note-tabs preview and filed notice can inherit the refreshed copy from the existing display helper
copy stays under handheld budgets
no new journal shell, archive panel, or comparison dashboard appears
non_goals: Do not add more fact volume just because the arc is ending.
Do not add another close-look pack or broad Tundra/Treeline content pass.
Do not widen the notebook UI.
Do not edit station, map, locator, or chapter-state behavior; lane 1 owns post-filed closure state.
Do not add a new observation prompt unless the filed-note path cannot carry the relationship.

main_322_focus.spatial_target: Protect the existing open-fell `talus-hold` finish as the final High Pass arrival moment, then add only proof-first return/readiness coverage unless live proof shows a tiny existing-rest extension is necessary.

preferred_band.constraint: Improve arrival and return readability without another High Pass pocket; if geometry is needed, prefer widening the existing `fell-island-rest` a few pixels rightward over adding a new platform.

verification_targets: the final High Pass moment settles on the existing open-fell island band
inspecting the final talus-hold clue flips `treeline-high-pass` to `Ready To File`
return-to-file or exit guidance is legible from that ready state
no new density competes with Stone Shelter, Rime Brow, or the existing talus-hold chain
non_goals: Do not add another climb family.
Do not add another right-side lift or alpine extension.
Do not move corridor doors, map-return posts, or rewrite travel logic.
Do not add new carriers, inspectables, or another route clue.

main_324_focus.display_target: Keep the existing one-card expedition page, but make the filed High Pass card stop using start-facing expedition chrome.
verification_targets: filed High Pass expedition display no longer says `STARTS`
activating the filed High Pass expedition card no longer emits `Start:`
active or ready Root Hollow expedition states still retain their normal start/route cue
non_goals: Do not add a new station page or panel.
Do not reopen route locator, atlas, archive, or world-map behavior unless the start chrome requires it.
Do not add new High Pass geography, route clues, or filed synthesis copy.

main_325_focus.activation_target: In `activateExpeditionCard()`, let explicit expedition `noticeText` win before the older logged-expedition world-map redirect so the High Pass `NOTE READY / FILE` card keeps the player at the field station with filing guidance.
verification_targets: pressing `Enter` on the note-ready High Pass expedition card shows the station filing notice
the note-ready activation keeps the player on the field station expedition page
active High Pass still opens the Treeline Pass world-map focus
filed High Pass still shows `EXPEDITION LOGGED` without `Start:`
non_goals: Do not add a new station page, panel, or route shell.
Do not reopen route locator, atlas, archive, or filed synthesis copy.
Do not change High Pass route completion rules or add geography.

main_323_focus.loop_target: Add an end-to-end deterministic smoke path from season closure into High Pass ready-to-file and filed states.
main_323_focus.dependency_target: Run this after `ECO-20260419-critic-320`, `ECO-20260419-critic-321`, `ECO-20260419-critic-322`, `ECO-20260419-critic-324`, and `ECO-20260419-critic-325` so the final proof asserts the settled filed-state semantics instead of today's pre-closure `High Pass NEXT` behavior.
preferred_test_shape: reuse the existing live talus-hold runtime setup (`createHighPassFellHoldSave`, `findHighPassFellHoldStartX`, and `treelineOpenFellIslandBand`)
complete `talus-hold` into `ready-to-synthesize` through a real inspect
return to the field station and file `treeline-high-pass` from the routes page
assert the filed `HIGH PASS` notice uses the lane-2 finalized filed synthesis text
assert post-filed request, station, journal, and world-map state no longer present High Pass as an unstarted live target
main_323_focus.support_target: Confirm support behavior around High Pass remains stable after filing and that replay/active request labels do not keep surfacing `Today: High Pass` once the route is filed.
main_323_focus.notice_target: Add a route-notice priority check for the final filing moment so the player gets the right filed feedback instead of a generic guided prompt.
verification_targets: the game can be smoke-tested from season closure into High Pass completion
filed High Pass state is stable across station, map, journal/notice, and route request state
no new Route v2 framework is added
non_goals: Do not add a second High Pass route.
Do not add a larger replay framework.
Do not add new support UI chrome.
